final.subject: Trademark Search, Screening, and Brand Protection — relevant
final.body:
Hi Marcus, Current timing pressure can make first-touch consistency harder to keep tight.
Trademark search, screening, and brand protection helps enforce message relevance without adding manager overhead.
Corsearch is the global leader in trademark clearance.
Corsearch is the global leader in trademark clearance, brand protection, and ip enforcement.
Trademark search, screening, and brand protection helps teams detect risky patterns, prioritize high-impact cases, and route follow-up actions without losing context.
In week one, we'd run a focused sweep and teardown, then hand over a prioritized enforcement workflow by risk tier.

Open to a quick 15-minute chat next week?
